original: Possessed of a remarkable intelligence for a piscine species, the golden fanfin deliberately lays its almost invisible eggs near spaceports and industrial water intake. This behaviour has enabled it to spread itself across the galaxy to the extent that it is now unknown where it originated from, appearing on almost any world that has water and carbon-based lifeforms. Despite this remarkable range, it is highly elusive in its natural habitat, able to intuitively avoid nets and other attempts to control or catch it. It is considered a symbol of luck in many cultures.
